action.message:
I have completed the planning stage for the Blog feature.

The following artifacts have been created:
1. `.agentcode/blueprints/_roles.yaml` - Defines the `admin` and `user` roles.
2. `.agentcode/blueprints/blogs.yaml` - Defines the `Blog` model with `title`, `body`, and `published` fields, owned by an organization. It also sets up the permissions for admins (full CRUD) and users (read-only).
3. `.rhino-plan.md` - The implementation plan detailing the models, screens, and implementation order.
4. `.codalio/acceptance-criteria.json` - Contains the acceptance criteria for the feature.
5. `.codalio/index.json` - The project index.

Wrote 2 criteria: 2 from PRD, 0 Extras, 0 gap-compensated.
Mapped 0 PRD functions to backend ops (0 flagged as gaps requiring scaffolded controls).

The develop stage can now proceed with running `bundle exec rails agentcode:blueprint` to generate the models and migrations.

tool_call.name: finish
tool_call.arguments:
